ingredients_text: Protein blend (milk protein isolate, whey protein isolate), soluble corn fiber, cashew butter, isomalto-oligosaccharides (vegetable source), unsweetened chocolate, erythritol, water, cocoa butter, natural flavors, sea salt, sunflower lecithin, steviol glycosides (stevia).
ingredients_text_en: Protein blend (milk protein isolate, whey protein isolate), soluble corn fiber, cashew butter, isomalto-oligosaccharides (vegetable source), unsweetened chocolate, erythritol, water, cocoa butter, natural flavors, sea salt, sunflower lecithin, steviol glycosides (stevia).
ingredients_text_en_ocr_1588712454: INGREDIENTS: Protein blend (whey protein isolate and milk protein isolate), dietary fiber from tapioca starch, cashews, unsweetened chocolate, erythritol, natural flavors, cocoa butter, sea salt, water, sunflower lecithin, steviol glycosides (stevia). CONTAINS: Milk, cashews.
ingredients_text_en_ocr_1588712454_resul: Protein blend (whey protein isolate and milk protein isolate), dietary fiber from tapioca starch, cashews, unsweetened chocolate, erythritol, natural flavors, cocoa butter, sea salt, water, sunflower lecithin, steviol glycosides (stevia). CONTAINS: Milk, cashews.
ingredients_text_with_allergens: Protein blend (milk protein isolate, whey protein isolate), soluble corn fiber, cashew butter, isomalto-oligosaccharides (vegetable source), unsweetened chocolate, erythritol, water, cocoa butter, natural flavors, sea salt, sunflower lecithin, steviol glycosides (stevia).

ingredients_text_with_allergens_zh: 蛋白质混合物（牛奶蛋白分离物、乳清蛋白分离物），可溶性玉米纤维，腰果酱，异麦芽低聚糖（植物来源），无糖巧克力，赤藓糖醇，水，可可脂，天然香料，海盐，葵花籽卵磷脂，甜菊醇苷（甜菊糖）。
ingredients_text_zh: 蛋白质混合物（牛奶蛋白分离物、乳清蛋白分离物），可溶性玉米纤维，腰果酱，异麦芽低聚糖（植物来源），无糖巧克力，赤藓糖醇，水，可可脂，天然香料，海盐，葵花籽卵磷脂，甜菊醇苷（甜菊糖）。
